mapper.insert: insert into sys_refresh_token (id, token_id, user_id, expire_time, create_by, update_by) values (#{id}, #{tokenId}, #{userId}, #{expireTime}, #{createBy}, #{createBy}) on conflict (token_id) do nothing
mapper.update: update sys_refresh_token set revoked = true, revoked_at = LOCALTIMESTAMP(6), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = LOCALTIMESTAMP(6) where user_id = #{userId} and revoked = false and status = 1
mapper.select: select exists( select 1 from sys_refresh_token where token_id = #{tokenId} and status = 1 and revoked = false and expire_time > LOCALTIMESTAMP(6) )
mapper.insert: insert into sys_token_blacklist (id, token_id, user_id, token_type, expire_time, invalidated_by, create_by, update_by) values (#{id}, #{tokenId}, #{userId}, #{tokenType}, #{expireTime}, #{invalidatedBy}, #{createBy}, #{createBy}) on conflict (token_id) do nothing
mapper.select: select exists( select 1 from sys_token_blacklist where token_id = #{tokenId} and status = 1 and expire_time > LOCALTIMESTAMP(6) )
